PostToolUse.description: Run tests after file edits to catch regressions immediately

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+push.*main|git\s+push.*master|git\s+push\s+-f|git\s+push\s+--force'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Push direto para main/master ou force push não permitido. Use feature branch + PR.' >&2; exit 2; fi
PreToolUse.description: Block direct push to main/master and force pushes

PreToolUse.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'src/components/ui/|src/integrations/supabase/types\.ts'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Arquivo protegido. src/components/ui/* e src/integrations/supabase/types.ts não devem ser editados manualmente. Use: npx shadcn-ui@latest add <component> ou regenere os types via Supabase CLI.' >&2; exit 2; fi
PreToolUse.description: Block manual edits to protected files (shadcn/ui and supabase types)
